title: Someone Cut Their Hair While They Slept...
description: Six families woke to find their hair precisely cut in locked homes with no signs of entry. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 847: The Phantom Barber - How Did They Get Inside?
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Someone was cutting hair from sleeping victims in Pascagoula, entering locked homes without breaking in. The families never woke up. Subscribe for more classified files from the Department of the Unknown.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption:
Someone was cutting your hair while you slept and you never woke up. Six families in Pascagoula discovered sections of their hair had been precisely cut overnight. Doors remained locked from the inside, windows showed no tampering, yet the phantom barber moved through their homes like a ghost.

#horror #scary #paranormal #mystery #creepy #fyp #truecrime #unexplained #phantombarber #mississippi #storytime #viral
